description: Mexican criminal and terrorist organization formed in 2015 after a split from Los Zetas following the capture of Omar Treviño Morales. Based in Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, it engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, human trafficking, money laundering, and murder. Designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department in February 2025. Controls territory in several Mexican states and has operational presence in the United States, Guatemala, Honduras, and Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: en este último, se cree que le quitó a Los Zetas el negocio de la compra de cocaína
country_links.context: The organization took over the cocaine purchasing business from Los Zetas in Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Se dice que tiene presencia operacional en Estados Unidos , Guatemala , Honduras y Colombia
country_links.context: The organization has operational presence in Guatemala.

country_links.evidence_quote: Se dice que tiene presencia operacional en Estados Unidos ... la mayoría proviene de armerías en Arizona y Texas , Estados Unidos
country_links.context: The organization has operational presence in the United States and sources weapons from armerías in Arizona and Texas.
